name: manifest-host-demo
description: SP-4b + SP-11(+11b) recombination demo — household + tasks-v0 (multi-circle) + stoop composed in one @canopy/manifest-host, driven by a chat-agent with a mocked LLM. Proves: cross-app tool dispatch, multi-circle isolation through the host, namespaced (appId.opId) routing, 3-app collision-free composition, and a canonical cross-app embeds:[{type,ref}] reference resolved across apps.
